description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and a global before_script that logs in to $CI_REGISTRY using $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD. Define a single build stage. Add a build job that runs on all branches except master, executes docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" --build-arg "commit_ref=${CI_COMMIT_SHA}" . then docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG". Add a build-master job that runs only on the master branch, builds the image with tag $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE (no suffix) using the same build-arg, and pushes it. Both jobs inherit the before_script login step.
